reasons: Angela helps Sun survive during extended fights where his clones and basic attacks need time to create value.
Shielding support makes Sun harder to burst before his sustained pressure matters.

proof.summary: Sun provides sustained clone pressure, while Angela helps keep him alive during the fight.
worksBestWhen: Angela attaches after Sun commits to a real fight, not only a clone bait.
Sun keeps attacking during Angela's protection window.
failureCases: The enemy disengages and waits out Angela's protection.
Sun is controlled before he can use his sustained damage.

reasons: Floryn can support Sun even when he pressures a side lane or objective away from the main group.
Sun benefits from global sustain because his value often comes from extended pressure rather than instant burst.

proof.summary: Sun applies split-pressure and extended-fight pressure, while Floryn's global healing helps him stay active even when separated from the team.
worksBestWhen: Floryn saves Bloom for Sun's committed side-lane fight or objective contest.
Sun uses the healing window to continue pressure or safely disengage.
failureCases: Sun is collapsed on by multiple enemies with hard crowd control.
Floryn uses global healing before Sun fully commits.

reasons: Tigreal can hold enemies in place while Sun and his Doppelgangers attack.
This improves Sun's ability to keep hitting instead of being kited.

proof.summary: Tigreal controls enemies, giving Sun time to stack pressure with clones.
worksBestWhen: Sun enters after Tigreal confirms the crowd-control window.
Tigreal controls targets close enough for Sun's clones to attack.
failureCases: Enemies disengage before Sun reaches them.
Sun enters before the control window is available.

reasons: Kaja can drag a target into Sun's attack range.
Sun's clones help punish the isolated target during and after the suppression window.

proof.summary: Kaja isolates one enemy, and Sun uses clones and basic attacks to finish the target.
worksBestWhen: Kaja pulls the target into Sun's active Doppelganger zone.
Sun is close enough to follow the suppression immediately.
failureCases: Sun is too far away to follow.

reasons: Minotaur gives Sun a stronger frontline and sustain layer in grouped fights.
His knock-up pressure can keep enemies in Sun's melee range.

proof.summary: Minotaur keeps the fight stable while Sun applies clone-based sustained damage.
worksBestWhen: Minotaur starts or stabilizes the fight before Sun fully commits.
Sun fights inside Minotaur's healing and control area.
failureCases: Sun is forced to chase alone outside Minotaur's control zone.
Minotaur's crowd control is unavailable during Sun's commit.
